description: Comprehensive TrueNAS dashboard: system health, CPU, memory, ZFS pools & ARC, disks, network, services, shares, apps, VMs, boot environments, hardware/IPMI, alerts, tasks, security, advanced protocols, and exporter diagnostics.

options.content:
# TrueNAS Operations Center

Comprehensive monitoring covering **system health, CPU, memory, ZFS pools & ARC, disks, network, services, shares, apps, VMs, boot environments, hardware, alerts, tasks, and exporter diagnostics**.

> **Tip:** start with `$instance`, then narrow by `$pool`, `$dataset`, `$disk`, `$service`, `$app`, or `$method`. Collapsed detail rows keep the default view fast.

panels.description: Correlates memory pressure with ZFS ARC growth and swap usage.
panels.title: Memory and ARC Composition

panels.description: Fast ranking of which pools are consuming the most capacity.
panels.title: Pool Utilization

panels.description: Highlights the datasets closest to filling their available space.
panels.title: Top Dataset Utilization

panels.description: Aggregate interface throughput for the selected interfaces.
panels.title: Network Throughput

panels.description: CPU time breakdown by category. I/O wait indicates storage bottlenecks.
panels.title: CPU Breakdown

panels.description: Load average vs CPU core count. Load above core count means queueing.
panels.title: Load Average

panels.description: Per-core utilization. Helps identify single-threaded bottlenecks.
panels.title: Per-Core CPU Usage

panels.description: Per-core CPU temperatures. Sustained high temps indicate cooling issues.
panels.title: CPU Temperature per Core

panels.description: Swap in use. Any swap usage may indicate memory pressure.
panels.title: Swap Used

panels.description: Memory breakdown over time. ARC overlaps with cached — it's reclaimable.
panels.title: Memory Composition Over Time

panels.description: Swap space trends. Increasing swap usage is a red flag.
panels.title: Swap Usage Over Time

panels.description: Age of the oldest snapshot. Very old snapshots may waste space.
panels.title: Oldest Snap

panels.description: Per-pool fill ratio. Pools above 80% suffer performance degradation.
panels.title: Pool Utilization

panels.description: Datasets closest to filling their available space.
panels.title: Top Dataset Utilization

panels.description: Pool allocated and free space over time for capacity planning.
panels.title: Pool Capacity Trends

panels.description: Pool fragmentation over time. High fragmentation degrades performance.
panels.title: Pool Fragmentation

panels.description: Active scrub or resilver progress per pool.
panels.title: Pool Scan Progress

panels.description: Pool inventory with fill ratio, fragmentation, dedup ratio, autotrim, and health.

targets.expr: 100 * max by (pool) (truenas_pool_allocated_bytes{instance=~"$instance", pool=~"$pool"}) / clamp_min(max by (pool) (truenas_pool_size_bytes{instance=~"$instance", pool=~"$pool"}), 1)

panels.title: Pool Inventory

panels.description: Any non-zero error count warrants investigation.
panels.title: Pool Vdev Errors

panels.description: Estimated seconds remaining for active pool scans.
panels.title: Pool Scrub ETA

panels.description: ARC hit and miss rates. A rising miss rate means the working set exceeds ARC.
panels.title: ARC Hit & Miss Rates

panels.description: ARC size with min/max bounds. ARC growing to max is normal.
panels.title: ARC Size Over Time

panels.description: Cache hit ratios — higher is better.
panels.title: ARC & L2ARC Hit Ratios

panels.description: Demand access rates for data and metadata.
panels.title: Demand Data & Metadata Rates

panels.description: L2ARC I/O. High write with low hit ratio signals cache churn.
panels.title: L2ARC Throughput

panels.description: Disks in use by a pool.
panels.title: Used Disks

panels.description: Read/write throughput for the busiest devices.
panels.title: Disk Throughput by Device

panels.description: Per-disk health, performance, SMART status, and type.
panels.title: Disk Inventory

panels.description: SMB sessions, connections, and open files over time.
panels.title: SMB Activity Over Time

panels.description: Service runtime state and boot enablement.
panels.title: Service Inventory

panels.description: VM memory available vs in use.
panels.title: VM Memory Allocation

panels.description: Task status, enablement, and last run age.
panels.title: Task State Detail

targets.expr: label_replace(max(truenas_local_user_count{instance=~"$instance"}), "category", "Local Users", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(max(truenas_local_group_count{instance=~"$instance"}), "category", "Local Groups", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(max(truenas_certificate_count{instance=~"$instance"}), "category", "Certificates", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(max(truenas_privilege_count{instance=~"$instance"}), "category", "Privileges", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(max(truenas_keychain_credential_count{instance=~"$instance"}), "category", "Keychain Creds", "__name__", ".*")

panels.description: Days until certificate expires. Negative = already expired.
panels.title: Certificate Expiry

panels.description: FC port link speed in Gbit/s.
panels.title: FC Port Speed

panels.description: Detailed dataset capacity, encryption, quota, and snapshot info.

targets.expr: 100 * max by (dataset) (truenas_dataset_used_bytes{instance=~"$instance", dataset=~"$dataset"}) / clamp_min(max by (dataset) (truenas_dataset_used_bytes{instance=~"$instance", dataset=~"$dataset"}) + max by (dataset) (truenas_dataset_available_bytes{instance=~"$instance", dataset=~"$dataset"}), 1)

panels.title: Dataset Capacity Detail

panels.description: Per-method duration, success flag, and errors.
panels.title: API Method Detail

title: TrueNAS - Operations Center
